case_title: WEN HONG HU VS. CHUN WAH LEUNG, ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE: WAIVER SERVED MAR-17-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, MAN FONG

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,850.00 FILED BY HU, WEN HONG AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, CHUN WAH WONG, MAN FONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANTS TO MAY-25-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANTS DO NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINITFF WEN HONG HU IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY HSIN JU CHANG, CERTIFIED MANDARIN COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANTS CHUN WAH LEUNG AND MAN FONG WONG ARE PRESENT. ASSISTED BY AMY LO, CERTIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HU, WEN HONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG, CHUN WAH WONG, MAN FONG $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,150.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $500.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, CHUN WAH WONG, MAN FONG

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HU, WEN HONG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
